title: M.G.D. Higher Secondary School Management Website (Frontend)

requirements.summary: Build a public Home/About page that displays school identity details and contact information in English, including a clickable Instagram link.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page shows the school name, address, principal, two phone numbers, and Instagram handle/link in English.
Instagram link opens the correct Instagram page (or uses the handle in a clickable link).

file_operations.description: Create the public-facing Home/About page content in English with the required school identity fields, phone numbers, and a clickable link to the Instagram handle mgd_sahawar_ksj.
Wire the PublicHome page into the app routing as the publicly accessible landing route.

requirements.summary: Add Internet Identity login and gate all management modules behind authentication, allowing unauthenticated users to view only public pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users cannot access management routes/screens and are prompted to sign in.
After signing in with Internet Identity, management navigation becomes available.

file_operations.description: Create a Login/Logout button using the selected authorization component patterns (Internet Identity + query cache clearing on logout). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create an auth guard wrapper that blocks management routes when not authenticated and shows a sign-in prompt (using LoginButton). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Add a React Query hook to fetch the caller user profile (and avoid modal flash) based on the selected authorization guidance. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Prompt for user name on first login and save it using the selected authorization component flow (getCallerUserProfile/saveCallerUserProfile). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Add authenticated management route grouping guarded by RequireAuth; keep public routes accessible without authentication; display ProfileSetupDialog when appropriate.

requirements.summary: Implement the frontend Admissions module (list/search, create/edit, detail with photo display, delete with confirmation) backed by React Query and backend actor calls.
acceptanceCriteria: A user can add a new student with all fields and see it in the list.
A user can edit any field and the changes persist after refresh.
A user can view a student detail page with the photo displayed.
A user can delete a student and it is removed from list and backend storage.
Search/filter works for name and mobile number.

file_operations.description: Create React Query hooks for searching students (name/mobile filters), fetching a single student, and mutations for create/update/delete; ensure cache invalidation/refresh after mutations.
Create Admissions list view with search/filter by name and mobile number, plus navigation to create and detail screens; include clear loading/error states.

Create Admissions create/edit form covering all required fields; include photo upload handling using the selected blob-storage ExternalBlob flow for uploads and previews. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create student detail view that renders all fields and displays the uploaded photo using ExternalBlob.getDirectURL() where applicable; include loading/error states.
Create a delete confirmation dialog for student deletion (compose shadcn-ui dialog components; do not modify immutable ui components). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Register Admissions routes under the authenticated management area (list/create/edit/detail) and ensure they are reachable from management navigation.

requirements.summary: Implement the frontend Attendance module (mark attendance by date, save/update, and view per-student history over a date range).
acceptanceCriteria: User can mark attendance for multiple students for a selected date and save successfully.
Re-opening the same date shows previously saved attendance.
User can view attendance history for a selected student over a chosen date range.

file_operations.description: Create React Query hooks for fetching attendance by student and date range, plus mutations to record/update attendance and refresh relevant cached queries.
Create attendance screen to select a date, list students, mark Present/Absent with optional note, save updates, and show loading/error states for all operations.
Create a per-student attendance history panel with date range selection and results list/table; include user-friendly empty/loading/error states.
Register the Attendance route under the authenticated management area and ensure it is reachable via navigation.

requirements.summary: Implement the frontend Fees module to record payments for a selected student and view payment history with totals over a date range.
acceptanceCriteria: User can add a fee payment for a student and see it appear in that student's payment history.
Totals update correctly when changing the date range filter.
Data persists after refresh.

file_operations.description: Create React Query hooks for recording fees and fetching per-student fee history; compute and expose derived totals for a selected date range; ensure cache refresh after mutations.

Create Fees screen with student selection, fee entry form (date, amount, payment mode, optional note/receipt reference), payment history list, and totals that respond to date range filters with loading/error states.
Register the Fees route under the authenticated management area and ensure it is reachable via navigation.

requirements.summary: Implement the frontend Monthly Tests module to add and view monthly test records per student with filters by month and subject.
acceptanceCriteria: User can add monthly test entries for a student and retrieve them later.
Filtering by month limits results to the selected month.

file_operations.description: Create React Query hooks for recording monthly test entries and fetching per-student records; support client-side filtering by month/subject with clear loading/error states.
Create Monthly Tests screen with student selection, add-entry form (month, subject, marks/score, optional remark), list view, and filters by month and subject.
Register the Monthly Tests route under the authenticated management area and ensure it is reachable via navigation.

requirements.summary: Implement the frontend Exams module to add and view exam records per student with at least an exam-name filter.
acceptanceCriteria: User can add exam records for a student and view them later.
Filtering by exam name works and is reflected in the displayed list.

file_operations.description: Create React Query hooks for recording exams and fetching per-student exam records; support filtering by exam name and cache refresh after mutations.
Create Exams screen with student selection, add-entry form (exam name, exam date/session, subject, marks/grade, optional remark), list view, and exam-name filter with loading/error states.
Register the Exams route under the authenticated management area and ensure it is reachable via navigation.

requirements.summary: Add consistent navigation for public and management areas, use React Query for fetching/caching, and provide clear loading/error states for all CRUD operations.
acceptanceCriteria: All modules are reachable via a navigation menu.
Each module shows loading states during fetch and user-friendly error messages on failures.
Mutations (create/update/delete) refresh the relevant lists/details without manual page reload.

file_operations.description: Create a public layout with header/navigation to public pages and a visible LoginButton entry point; compose shadcn-ui primitives where helpful (do not modify immutable ui components). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create an authenticated management layout with navigation links to Admissions, Attendance, Fees, Monthly Tests, and Exams; show current user name (from user profile) and Logout.

Create a small shared loading state component used across pages to standardize loading UI (compose existing ui components; do not modify immutable ui components). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create a small shared error state component that turns common backend/authorization errors into user-friendly messages; reuse across modules.
Wire layouts and navigation into the routing tree; ensure all management modules are reachable and guarded; ensure React Query-driven pages use consistent loading/error handling components.
Adjust QueryClient configuration if needed to improve UX for mutations (e.g., sensible retry defaults) and ensure logout clears cached data via the LoginButton flow.

requirements.summary: Define and apply a coherent school-appropriate visual theme (no blue/purple primary) consistently across public pages and management modules.
acceptanceCriteria: UI uses a consistent palette, spacing, and typography across all pages.
Primary brand colors are not blue/purple.
All main screens (Home/About, Admissions, Attendance, Fees, Monthly Tests, Exams) match the same design system.

file_operations.description: Add global theme tokens/styles (Tailwind + CSS variables) for a consistent school-appropriate palette (e.g., greens/oranges neutrals), typography, and spacing; ensure primary colors are not blue/purple.
Update Tailwind theme extensions as needed to support the chosen palette/typography and ensure consistent design across layouts and modules.
Apply the shared theme consistently in the public layout (header/sections/typography) without introducing conflicting colors.
Apply the shared theme consistently in the management layout navigation and content wrapper to match public pages.

requirements.summary: Add the required generated static images under frontend/public/assets/generated and render them in the UI via static paths (no backend image serving).
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated.
Frontend references the images via static paths and displays them correctly.
No backend endpoints are used to serve the generated static images.

file_operations.description: Add the generated static image asset (school emblem/crest) at the required path for direct frontend use.
Add the generated static image asset (homepage hero illustration) at the required path for direct frontend use.
Add the generated static image asset (favicon/icon) at the required path for direct frontend use.

Render frontend/public/assets/generated/home-hero.dim_1600x600.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/school-crest.dim_512x512.png within the public Home page UI via static asset paths (no backend usage).
Wire the favicon to frontend/public/assets/generated/favicon-school.dim_128x128.png using a static reference so it loads without any backend involvement.
Optionally include the crest image frontend/public/assets/generated/school-crest.dim_512x512.png in the header/branding area to reinforce identity via static asset paths.
